_comment: Step 3.5 coverage check — LLM semantic judgment (not keyword matching)
_note: 8 post_launch features deferred (Ring 2+). All 6 mvp_features covered (4 originally + 2 auto-fixed). 5 closure gaps auto-fixed (Ring 1).

matrix.feature: 无限画布（缩放、平移、网格对齐）
matrix._reasoning: implement-web goal 'tldraw 画布集成' semantically covers infinite canvas — tldraw provides zoom/pan/grid natively

matrix.feature: 基础绘图工具（画笔、形状、文本、箭头、便签）
matrix._reasoning: implement-web goal '绘图工具栏' covers drawing tools — tldraw provides these as built-in tools

matrix.feature: 实时多人协作（光标同步、冲突解决、在线状态）
matrix._reasoning: implement-realtime goal 'Yjs CRDT sync + WebSocket + 光标同步' covers collaboration core

matrix.feature: 组件库（可复用的设计元素，团队共享）
matrix.reason: post_launch feature (differentiator but not mvp), Ring 2+

评论与反馈（锚点评论、@提及、线程回复）
matrix.action: extended implement-api goal to include comment CRUD API; extended implement-web goal to include comment UI with anchored comments and @mentions
matrix._reasoning: mvp_feature — not covered by any node. implement-api only mentions '白板 CRUD' not comments.

matrix.feature: 版本历史（快照、回滚、分支对比）

matrix.feature: AI 辅助（智能排版、手绘转矢量、自动配色建议）

第三方集成（Figma 导入、Slack 通知、Jira 卡片嵌入）
离线模式（断网编辑、重连后自动合并）
